<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpClient; use Symfony\Component\HttpClient\Response\AsyncResponse; use Symfony\Component\HttpClient\Response\ResponseStream; use Symfony\Contracts\HttpClient\ResponseInterface; use Symfony\Contracts\HttpClient\ResponseStreamInterface; /** * Eases with processing responses while streaming them. * * @author Nicolas Grekas <p@tchwork.com> */ trait AsyncDecoratorTrait { use DecoratorTrait; /** * @return AsyncResponse */ abstract public function request(string $method, string $url, array $options = []): ResponseInterface; public function stream(ResponseInterface|iterable $responses, ?float $timeout = null): ResponseStreamInterface { if ($responses instanceof AsyncResponse) { $responses = [$responses]; } return new ResponseStream(AsyncResponse::stream($responses, $timeout, static::class)); } }
